flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Allen University are 28% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($30.5k vs $42.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Allen University fell 41% between 2021 and 2024 (22.7% → 13.3%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Allen University fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (62.2% → 45.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Allen University fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (8.7% → 6.8%).
